info.title: A10 aXAPI v3 Documentation - ROUTE-MAP
info.description: Auto-generated documentation for the route-map category.

thunder_ip.description: IP address or hostname of the Thunder device

get.description: Set values in destination routing protocol

post.description: Set values in destination routing protocol

put.description: Set values in destination routing protocol

delete.description: Set values in destination routing protocol

name.description: One or more Community Lists (numbered or named)
One or more Extended Community Lists (numbered or named)
One or more Large Community Lists (numbered or named)

ha-state.description: 'active': HA or VRRP-A in Active State; 'standby': HA or VRRP-A in Standby State;

operational-state.description: 'up': Scaleout is up and running; 'down': Scaleout is down or disabled;

ve.description: Virtual ethernet interface (Virtual ethernet interface number)

exact.description: Exact match a prefix (Prefix IPv4 address)
Exact match a prefix (Prefix IPv6 address)

value.description: 'type-1': Match OSPF External Type 1 metrics; 'type-2': Match OSPF External Type 2 metrics;
'level-1': Export into a level-1 area; 'level-1-2': Export into level-1 and level-2; 'level-2': Export into level-2 sub-domain;
'external': IS-IS external metric type; 'internal': IS-IS internal metric type; 'type-1': OSPF external type 1 metric; 'type-2': OSPF external type 2 metric;

dampening-half-time.description: Reachability Half-life time for the penalty(minutes)

dampening-reuse.description: Value to start reusing a route

dampening-supress.description: Value to start suppressing a route

dampening-max-supress.description: Maximum duration to suppress a stable route(minutes)

dampening-penalty.description: Un-reachability Half-life time for the penalty(minutes)

action.description: 'permit': Route map permits set operations; 'deny': Route map denies set operations;

sequence.description: Sequence to insert to/delete from existing route-map entry
